text.full_text:
This hotel is owned by KQ Hotel Management Company No. 2 Limited and managed by IHG Hotels Ltd
Registered Office: 250 Aztec West, Almondsbury, Bristol , United Kingdom BS32 4TR
Company Registration No : 14965930 – VAT NO GB 475 9130 67.
Hotel Indigo Gloucester – The Forum
Address: Hotel Indigo Gloucester - The Forum
4 Cathedral Walk Gloucester GL11SZ GB
Tel: 01452 668434  | Email: ingloucester.enquiries@ihg.com
Registration Card
Full Name:
 Testy Test 
Room Number:
Address:
Confirmation No:
43436499

10/03/26

11/03/26

1 / 0

GB

£144.00

IHG One Rewards Enrollment
I want to Sign Up
No     ☐   Yes   ☐
Terms and Conditions and 
Signature
By applying for membership, you accept and explicitly authorise InterContinental Hotels
Group to provide any stored personal information about you, and any other information it may receive about you, to any third parties 
which is affiliated within scope of the program, including InterContinental Hotels Group in such countries where they may be 
situated, for use of such information for its (their) administrative, guest service, marketing and/or communication purposes or to third 
parties to process your personal data on behalf of, where required by applicable law or in event of a company reorganisation, 
merger or acquisition. They or we may contact you for marketing purposes by mail, fax, telephone, or email. Also, a mailing list of 
IHG Rewards Club members may occasionally be provided to various companies that offer goods and services that may be of 
interest or value to you.
Signature: _______________________________________________
Express Checkout
I would like an express checkout
No     ☐   Yes   ☐
Wake Up Call
I would like a wakeup call
No     ☐   Yes   ☐     Time:
Terms & Conditions and Signature
I agree that my credit card will be authorised for the room rate per night (if applicable), plus a charge per night for incidentals which may be consumed. For 
cash paying guests the same deposit is required. We reserve the right to charge your credit card for the full balance of your account if you fail to return to 
reception and check out or in the event the nominated payer fails to settle any part of the account. We regret that we cannot accept any liability for any 
valuables in the room or parking vehicles. I also take full responsibility and authorise my credit/debit card to be charged for any damages to hotel property 
caused as result of my actions during the stay.
NOTE Please check and confirm your departure date upon check-in. Early departure will be subjected to a £50 fee.
NOTE Please be informed that smoking is prohibited in the entire building and we reserve the right to charge you a fee which starts from £150 if you don't 
comply to our non-smoking policy.
NOTE Signature is provided in acceptance with hotel Terms and conditions
Guest Signature: _______________________________________________
Data Protection / Privacy Information
Intercontinental Hotel Group and its affiliated companies would like to process your details for marketing and communication purposes and would like to send you from time-to-time
information that we think you would find of interest by mail. In the course of processing your information for these purposes, it may be transferred from time to time to other 
countries where a regional office or a hotel of the InterContinental Hotels Group is located which may or may not be within the European Union. Please tick the box if you wish this 
to happen. ☐

Group to provide any stored personal information about you, and any other information it may receive about you, to any third parties 
which is affiliated within scope of the program, including InterContinental Hotels Group in such countries where they may be 
situated, for use of such information for its (their) administrative, guest service, marketing and/or communication purposes or to third 
parties to process your personal data on behalf of, where required by applicable law or in event of a company reorganisation, 
merger or acquisition. They or we may contact you for marketing purposes by mail, fax, telephone, or email. Also, a mailing list of

I agree that my credit card will be authorised for the room rate per night (if applicable), plus a charge per night for incidentals which may be consumed. For 
cash paying guests the same deposit is required. We reserve the right to charge your credit card for the full balance of your account if you fail to return to 
reception and check out or in the event the nominated payer fails to settle any part of the account. We regret that we cannot accept any liability for any 
valuables in the room or parking vehicles. I also take full responsibility and authorise my credit/debit card to be charged for any damages to hotel property 
caused as result of my actions during the stay.
NOTE Please check and confirm your departure date upon check-in. Early departure will be subjected to a £50 fee.
NOTE Please be informed that smoking is prohibited in the entire building and we reserve the right to charge you a fee which starts from £150 if you don't 
comply to our non-smoking policy.

Data Protection / Privacy Information
Intercontinental Hotel Group and its affiliated companies would like to process your details for marketing and communication purposes and would like to send you from time-to-time
information that we think you would find of interest by mail. In the course of processing your information for these purposes, it may be transferred from time to time to other 
countries where a regional office or a hotel of the InterContinental Hotels Group is located which may or may not be within the European Union. Please tick the box if you wish this 
to happen. ☐
